examples.title: Gauss Elimination Method
examples.description: A pseudocode implementation of the Gauss Elimination Method.
examples.code:
ALGORITHM GaussElimination(A, b)
BEGIN
FOR i FROM 1 TO n DO
FOR j FROM i+1 TO n DO
IF A[i, j] != 0 THEN
FOR k FROM i TO n DO
A[k, j] = A[k, j] - A[k, i] * A[i, j] / A[i, i]
END FOR
END IF
END FOR
END FOR
FOR i FROM n TO 1 DO
x[i] = b[i] / A[i, i]
FOR j FROM i-1 TO 1 DO
b[j] = b[j] - A[j, i] * x[i]
END FOR
END FOR
RETURN x
END ALGORITHM
examples.explanation: This pseudocode implements the Gauss Elimination Method to solve a system of linear equations.
